explanations.9: The first number (8080) is the port on your computer, and the second number (80) is the port inside the container; traffic coming to localhost:8080 gets forwarded to port 80 inside the Joomla container.
explanations.11: JOOMLA_DB_HOST is set to 'joomladb' (the service name above), which Docker's networking automatically resolves so the Joomla container can find the database container.
explanations.13: depends_on tells Docker to start the joomladb service before starting the joomla service, ensuring the database is ready when the app tries to connect.
